case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TREASUSER/TAX VS. INVESTORS PUBLISHING & RESEARCH LLC AKA IP& R

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TREASUSER/TAX COLLECTOR A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION

SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TREASUSER/TAX COLLECTOR A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT INVESTORS PUBLISHING & RESEARCH LLC AKA IP& R JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TREASUSER/TAX COLLECTOR A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INVESTORS PUBLISHING & RESEARCH LLC AKA IP& R $237,248.34 PRINCIPAL, $66,609.59 INTEREST, $152.00 COSTS, $145,827.15 TAX PENALTIES,, TOTAL JUDGMENT $449,837.08, ** LESS DEFENDANT'S PAYMENTS OF $70,209.29 ($449,837.08 - $70,209.29) THE TOTAL JUDGMENT BECAME $379,627.29 ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
